name: Gold Tone Spiral Sunburst Pendant Necklace
description: Make a radiant statement with this bold gold-tone necklace. Featuring a large sunburst pendant with a unique spiral center on a sleek snake chain, this anti-tarnish piece ensures long-lasting shine and elevated everyday style.

media.alt_text: Model wearing a gold tone sunburst pendant necklace with a spiral center

faqs.question: What type of chain does this necklace have?
faqs.answer: This necklace features a smooth, flexible snake chain that complements the bold sun pendant perfectly.

faqs.question: Is this necklace anti-tarnish?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is crafted with a high-quality anti-tarnish finish to maintain its radiant golden shine.

meta_title: Gold Tone Spiral Sun Pendant Necklace | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the Gold Tone Spiral Sunburst Pendant Necklace. Featuring a striking sun design on a sleek snake chain and a premium anti-tarnish finish.
